name: Barfi Badam (Almond Cream Sweetmeat)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy-based saucepan or large frying pan, boil the milk over fairly high heat, stirring constantly until it reduces and becomes very thick.
2. Add sugar and stir for 10 minutes on low heat.
3. Gradually add ground almonds and continue to cook while stirring until the mixture comes away from the sides and base of the pan as one mass.
4. Remove from heat, sprinkle with cardamom, and mix well.
5. Turn onto a greased plate. Smooth the top with the back of a butter spoon.
6. Allow to cool slightly, then cut into diamond shapes using a knife.
7. Decorate with halved pistachio nuts and edible silver leaf (if using).
8. Before the barfi is completely firm, cut along the markings with a sharp knife.
9. Let it cool before separating into pieces.
